final:
module RefModule(
    input A,
    input SLEEP_B,
    input CLK,
    output reg Y
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (SLEEP_B == 0 && A == 1) begin
            Y <= 1;
        end else begin
            Y <= 0;
        end
    end

endmodule
